name: revit_create_view_template
description: Creates a view template from a source view and applies parts visibility, detail level, and category override settings.

source_view_id.description: View id where IsViewValidForTemplateCreation is true

parts_visibility_controlled.description: When false, exclude VIEW_PARTS_VISIBILITY from template control

detail_level.description: Detail level to set on the new template

assign_to_source_view.description: Whether to set ViewTemplateId on the source view after creation

notes: Replace ViewTemplateCreationForm; optional category override map can extend ChangeVgOverridesModelSettings behavior.
